zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda FitzSwain於大約1136年出生在英國越可爾希爾可斯同時，她的父親Adam FitzSwain20歲，母親Beatrice18歲。她於1160年與John de Malherbe II在英國越可爾希爾可斯同結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1181年在英國越可爾沃斯布盧享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda FitzSwain于大约1136年出生在英国越可爾希爾可斯同时，她的父亲Adam FitzSwain20岁，母亲Beatrice18岁。她于1160年与John de Malherbe II在英国越可爾希爾可斯同结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1181年在英国越可爾沃斯布盧享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda FitzSwain was born about 1136, in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England, her father, Adam FitzSwain, was 20 and her mother, Beatrice, was 18. She married John de Malherbe II in 1160, in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1181, in Worsbrough, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda FitzSwain est née environ 1136, à Silkstone, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Adam FitzSwain, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Beatrice, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John de Malherbe II en 1160, à Silkstone, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1181, à Worsbrough, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda FitzSwain um 1136 in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam FitzSwain 20 und ihre Mutter Beatrice 18. Sie hat 1160 in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England John de Malherbe II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1181 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Worsbrough, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda FitzSwain è nata il circa 1136 nel Silkstone, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Adam FitzSwain, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Beatrice, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato John de Malherbe II nel 1160, nel Silkstone, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1181, nel Worsbrough, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda FitzSwainが約1136年にイギリスヨークシュアイアシルクストーンで生まれた時，父Adam FitzSwainは20歳，母Beatriceは18歳であった。1160年にイギリスヨークシュアイアシルクストーンでJohn de Malherbe IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1181年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルスブロウで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda FitzSwain(이)가 대략 1136년 영국 요르크실르 시크스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam FitzSwain(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1160년 영국 요르크실르 시크스톤에서 John de Malherbe II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1181년 영국 요르크실르 워스브루그h에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda FitzSwain nasceu aproximadamente 1136, em Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam FitzSwain, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Malherbe II em 1160, em Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1181, em Worsbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda FitzSwain родилась около 1136 г. в местности силкстоун, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam FitzSwain было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Malherbe II в 1160 г. в местности силкстоун, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1181 г. в местности ворсброую, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda FitzSwain nació aproximadamente 1136, en Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam FitzSwain, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Beatrice, tenía 18 años. Se casó con John de Malherbe II en 1160, en Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1181, en Worsbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
